name: PDF SOLUTIONS INC
summary: PDF Solutions, Inc. provides comprehensive data solutions for the semiconductor and electronics ecosystems, offering software, SaaS, engineering services, and hardware systems. Key products include the PDF Solutions Platform, DirectScan (e-beam inspection), eProbe inline inspection, Cimetrix connectivity/control software, and secureWISE secure data exchange network. Revenue comes from Platform fees (licenses, SaaS, engineering) and Volume-based fees (Cimetrix runtime licenses, secureWISE data, Gainshare royalties). Customers include IDMs, fabless companies, foundries, OSATs, equipment manufacturers, EMS, ODMs, and system houses.

products.name: PDF Solutions Platform
products.description: AI-ready data platform for semiconductor manufacturing analytics, integrating characterization, process development, and high-volume manufacturing data.

products.name: DirectScan System
products.description: Voltage contrast e-beam inspection system combined with design layout analysis to identify systematic failures inline.

products.name: eProbe
products.description: Inline inspection tool designed to test over 60 trillion vias per year per tool and detect defects in 3D structures.

products.name: Characterization Vehicle (CV) Systems
products.description: Test chip systems generating tens of thousands of experiments and billions of measurements per wafer for process characterization.

products.name: Cimetrix
products.description: Connectivity and control software for semiconductor manufacturing equipment; approximately 8,000 pieces of equipment shipped with it enabled in 2025.

products.name: secureWISE
products.description: Secure data exchange network connecting over 300 manufacturing locations and 100+ equipment OEMs with end-to-end encryption and zero trust architecture.

products.name: Sapience Manufacturing Hub
products.description: Internal orchestration solution integrating MES, ERP, PLM, and EDA tools to eliminate data wrangling in manufacturing workflows.
